note: Fixed-path active-stage pointer. A new session reads this first to locate the active stage in one hop, without scanning reports/agent-runs/. When a stage starts, the bookkeeper sets active to {stage_id, phase, handoff, updated_at}; when the stage is accepted/merged/abandoned, active returns to null and last_completed is updated.
